summary: A brief news article highlighting Diane Hendricks' investments in downtown Beloit, Wisconsin. Although she declined an interview for the piece, a quote from her company's website emphasizes her deep, long-term commitment to the local community where she built her business.

principles.statement: Remain committed to the community where you built your business and relationships.
principles.rationale: The city where a business is founded and where lifelong friends are made deserves ongoing investment and loyalty.
principles.source_quote: For over 40 years we have worked in the city of Beloit. It’s the city we learned to call home. We founded our business here and made lifelong friends. I will continue that commitment to our community.

signature_quotes.text: For over 40 years we have worked in the city of Beloit. It’s the city we learned to call home. We founded our business here and made lifelong friends. I will continue that commitment to our community.
signature_quotes.context: Stated on the Hendricks Commercial Properties website regarding her ongoing investments in Beloit, Wisconsin.
